proof:
rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    have key : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
      field_simp [a, b, c, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2]
      rw [h₁]
    nlinarith
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a + b + c - 1) := by rw [h]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
failed_attempts:
let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have hx : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1
  have hy : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1
  have hz : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2
  have h : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    simp [a, b, c, h₁]
    field_simp [hx, hy, hz]
  calc
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2
    _ = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  have : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by nlinarith [h]
  nlinarith [this]

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  set a := x / (x - 1) with ha
  set b := y / (y - 1) with hb
  set c := z / (z - 1) with hc
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← ha, ← hb, ← hc]
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    rw [ha, hb, hc]; field_simp; rw [h₁]; ring
  have h_eq : a + b + c = a * b + b * c + c * a + 1 := by nlinarith [h]
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (a * b + b * c + c * a + 1) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by rw [h_eq]
    _ = (a * b + b * c + c * a) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    dsimp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero]
    have id : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 - ((a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1) =
        2 * ((a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) - a * b * c) := by ring
    rw [id, h, sub_self, mul_zero]
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow, key]
  exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg _)

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h_subst : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by
    simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
  rw [h_subst]
  have h_rel : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_alg : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [h_rel]
  rw [h_alg]
  nlinarith

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h_prod : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    field_simp [hx, hy, hz]; rw [h₁]
  have h_sym : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero] at h_prod ⊢; rw [← h_prod]; ring
  have h_subst : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by
    dsimp [a, b, c]; simp only [div_pow]
  rw [h_subst]
  have h_sos : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    calc
      a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
      _ = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a + b + c - 1) := by rw [h_sym]
      _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
  rw [h_sos]
  exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg _)

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    have hx : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1
    have hy : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1
    have hz : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2
    field_simp [a, b, c, hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a * b + b * c + c * a) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    have : a + b + c = a * b + b * c + c * a + 1 := by
      rw [← sub_eq_zero] at h ⊢
      convert h using 1
      ring
    rw [this]; ring
  rw [div_pow, div_pow, div_pow]
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  rw [key]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have hx : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1
  have hy : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1
  have hz : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2
  have h : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
    ring
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a + b + c - 1) := by rw [h]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    dsimp only [a, b, c]
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_eq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith
  rw [h_eq]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  have h_identity : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    have hx : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1
    have hy : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1
    have hz : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2
    field_simp [a, b, c, hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_sym : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by nlinarith
  rw [ge_iff_le, le_iff_sub_nonneg]
  have h_sq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 - 1 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 := by
    rw [← h_sym]
    ring
  rw [h_sq]
  exact sq_nonneg _

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_sum : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by nlinarith [h]
  have h_sq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [h_sum]
  rw [h_sq]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  suffices a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1 by simpa [a, b, c] using this
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
    ring
  have h_sum : a + b + c = 1 + (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← sub_eq_zero] at h ⊢
    ring_nf at h ⊢
    exact h
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (1 + (a * b + b * c + c * a)) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by rw [h_sum]
    _ = (a * b + b * c + c * a) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h₂ : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    unfold a b c
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have h₃ : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    have : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c - (a * b + b * c + c * a) + (a + b + c) - 1 := by ring
    linarith [h₂, this]
  have h₄ : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [h₃]
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  rw [h₄]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h_abc : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, h₁, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2]
  have h_sum : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← sub_eq_zero.mpr h_abc]
    ring
  rw [ge_iff_le, ← sub_nonneg]
  have h_sq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 - 1 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 := by
    have id : (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) - 2 * (a + b + c) + 1 := by ring
    rw [id, h_sum]
    ring
  rw [h_sq]
  exact sq_nonneg _

rw [div_pow, div_pow, div_pow]
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_sum : a + b + c = a * b + b * c + c * a + 1 := by
    ring_nf at h
    linarith
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (a * b + b * c + c * a + 1) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by rw [h_sum]
    _ = (a * b + b * c + c * a) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h_rel : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    simp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr hx, sub_ne_zero.mpr hy, sub_ne_zero.mpr hz]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_sum : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← sub_eq_zero] at h_rel
    ring_nf at h_rel ⊢
    exact h_rel
  rw [show x^2 / (x - 1)^2 + y^2 / (y - 1)^2 + z^2 / (z - 1)^2 = a^2 + b^2 + c^2 by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]]
  rw [ge_iff_le, ← sub_nonneg]
  have h_sq : a^2 + b^2 + c^2 - 1 = (a + b + c - 1)^2 := by
    rw [show (a + b + c - 1)^2 = a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) - 2 * (a + b + c) + 1 by ring]
    rw [h_sum]
    ring
  rw [h_sq]
  exact sq_nonneg _

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h_abc : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_sym : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    have : a * b * c - (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b + b * c + c * a - (a + b + c) + 1 := by ring
    linarith
  calc
    x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2
      = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
    _ = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a + b + c - 1) := by rw [h_sym]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by apply le_add_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg _)

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    simp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 - 1 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith
  rw [← sub_nonneg, key]
  exact sq_nonneg _

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h₂ : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    simp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
    ring
  have h₃ : a + b + c = a * b + b * c + c * a + 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← sub_self (a * b * c), h₂]
    ring
  calc x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2
    _ = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 - 2 * (a + b + c - (a * b + b * c + c * a + 1)) := by ring
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by rw [h₃]; ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  suffices a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1 by simpa [a, b, c, div_pow]
  have h : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by nlinarith [h]
  have sq_sum : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [key]
  rw [sq_sum]
  nlinarith

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    simp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
    ring
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  have key : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith
  rw [key]
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a + b + c - 1)]

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    simp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by nlinarith [h]
  calc x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2
    _ = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [key]
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by field_simp [hx, hy, hz]; rw [h₁]
  have key : a + b + c = a * b + b * c + c * a + 1 := by nlinarith [h]
  have id : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [key]
  have subst : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by
    simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
  rw [subst, id]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h₂ : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    simp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have h₃ : a^2 + b^2 + c^2 = (a + b + c - 1)^2 + 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero] at h₂ ⊢
    ring_nf at h₂ ⊢
    linarith
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  change a^2 + b^2 + c^2 ≥ 1
  rw [h₃]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    have id : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c - (a * b + b * c + c * a) + (a + b + c) - 1 := by ring
    linarith [h, id]
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  have eq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by rw [← key]; ring
  rw [eq]
  have : 0 ≤ (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
  linarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h₂ : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    dsimp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have h₃ : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by nlinarith [h₂]
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  have h₄ : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    have id : (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a - (a + b + c - 1)) := by ring
    rw [id, h₃]
    ring
  rw [h₄]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    dsimp [a, b, c]
    field_simp [h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by nlinarith [h]
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
successful_attempts:
rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    have key : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
      field_simp [a, b, c, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2]
      rw [h₁]
    nlinarith
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a + b + c - 1) := by rw [h]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := by nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have hx : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1
  have hy : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1
  have hz : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2
  have h : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero]
    trans a * b * c - (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1)
    · ring
    · rw [h, sub_self]
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  calc
    a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    _ = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a + b + c - 1) := by rw [key]
    _ = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by ring
    _ ≥ 1 := le_add_of_nonneg_of_le (sq_nonneg _) le_rfl

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have h₂ : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1, sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]
  have key : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero] at h₂ ⊢
    ring_nf at h₂ ⊢
    linear_combination 2 * h₂
  rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
  change a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ 1
  rw [key]
  nlinarith

let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have hx : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1
  have hy : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1
  have hz : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2
  have h_eq : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by
    simp [a, b, c, div_pow]
  rw [h_eq]
  have h : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, hx, hy, hz]
    rw [h₁]
  have h_lin : a + b + c - (a * b + b * c + c * a) - 1 = 0 := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero] at h
    ring_nf at h
    linarith
  have h_sq : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = 1 + (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 := by
    calc a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2
      _ = 1 + (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 2 * (a + b + c - (a * b + b * c + c * a) - 1) := by ring
      _ = 1 + (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 := by rw [h_lin, mul_zero, add_zero]
  rw [h_sq]
  exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (sq_nonneg _)
